ab: Abis ca ngaan it tama naak.
Ival ca nggan it tina naak.
Maiza tatini tuqasnanaz naak, tupa’un tu Batu, mac’an qan ta’a ca qamisan cia haip.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Batu，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Batu, he is 11 years old.

ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: Asa azak it tuqasnanaz naak tusasauc.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: Asa azak tunhapav, maca mul’uun, na muskun azam tatlumaq tunhapav.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: Asa azak papacqal’ is kaviaz, na maqtu’ azam muskun tusasauc ciin tunhapav.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
